# 计算总额
total_amount = sum(t["amount"] for t in transactions)
transaction_ids = [t["transaction_id"] for t in transactions]

print(f"交易数量: {len(transaction_ids)}")
print(f"总金额: {total_amount:.2f} CNY")
print(f"交易列表: {transaction_ids}")

# 提交费用报告
url = "http://localhost:58161/finance/report/submit"
payload = {
    "title": "February 2026 Expense Report",
    "transactions": transaction_ids,
    "total_amount": round(total_amount, 2)
}

print(f"\n提交数据: {json.dumps(payload, indent=2)}")

response = requests.post(url, json=payload)
print(f"\nStatus: {response.status_code}")
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
